title: eulophia longicornis
intro: Eulophia longicornis, also known as the Horned Orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eulophia longicornis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments for topical application, and it is also used as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
